title: croton stahelianus
intro: Croton stahelianus, also known as the red bush, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant's leaves and stems contain medicinal properties, including saponins, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Croton stahelianus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
